'''changobo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:headfit|headfit]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-ng-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:headfit|headfit]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| changobo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chængebeth|chængebeth]] || [[word:chængebej|chængebej]] || [[word:chængebesh|chængebesh]] || [[word:chængebe|chængebe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:changongoboth|changongoboth]] || [[word:changongoboj|changongoboj]] || [[word:changongobosh|changongobosh]] || [[word:changongobo|changongobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:changoboth|changoboth]] || [[word:changoboj|changoboj]] || [[word:changobosh|changobosh]] || [[word:changobo|changobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:changofboth|changofboth]] || [[word:changofboj|changofboj]] || [[word:changofbosh|changofbosh]] || [[word:changofbof|changofbof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:changobotho|changobotho]] || [[word:changobojo|changobojo]] || [[word:changobosho|changobosho]] || [[word:changoboko|changoboko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:changoboth|changoboth]] || [[word:changoboj|changoboj]] || [[word:changobosh|changobosh]] || [[word:changobo|changobo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:changobothol|changobothol]] || [[word:changobojol|changobojol]] || [[word:changoboshol|changoboshol]] || [[word:changobokol|changobokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:changobothotho|changobothotho]] || [[word:changobojojo|changobojojo]] || [[word:changoboshosho|changoboshosho]] || [[word:changoboko|changoboko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:changobothon|changobothon]] || [[word:changobojon|changobojon]] || [[word:changoboshon|changoboshon]] || [[word:changobokon|changobokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:changobothoro|changobothoro]] || [[word:changobojoro|changobojoro]] || [[word:changoboshoro|changoboshoro]] || [[word:changobokoro|changobokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
